ab: So’o nak’ino’ rima’ ray hataS?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: yako seme:ez ka kapapama’an rima’ ray hataS.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: siya ’am nak’ino’ rima’ ray sinsangan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: siya manra:an rima’ ray sinsangan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: So’o nak’ino’ rima’ ray pengho’
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: yako papama’ ka hikoki’ rima’ ray 澎湖.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: So’o nak’ino’ rima’ ray 澎湖?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: yako papama’ ka palono’ rima’ ray kabih no wasal.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: So’o nak’ino’ lobih ray taew’an?
en: How do you go home?

ab: yako papama’ ka ziyae’yon lobih ray taew’an.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: mowi’ papama’ ka kano’ rima’ ray kakiSka:atan?
en: How does mowi’ go to school?

ab: mowi’ papama’ ka kalihapoyan rima’ ray kakiSka:atan.
en: mowi’goes to school by train.

ab: ’ataw papama’ ka kano’ rima’ ray kiyokay?
en: How does ’ataw go to church?

ab: ’ataw papama’ ka zitinSiya’ rima’ ray kiyokay.
en: ’ataw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: So’o papama’ ka ziyae’yon ay rima’ kiSka:at?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ’oka’, ya:o papama’ ka baSe’ rima’ kiSka:at.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: So’o papama’ ka zitinSiya’ ay rima’ kiSka:at?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ’ihi’ yako papama’ ka zitinSiya’ rima’ kiSka:at.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: So’o papama’ ka kawti’ ay rima’ ray taka:o’?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ’ihi’, yako papama’ ka kawti’ rima’ ray taka:o’
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: So’o rima’ ray taytong papama’ ka kalihapoyan a hikoki’?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: yako papama’ ka hikoki’, hikoki’ ’alikaeh no kalihapoyan.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: So’o rima’ ray kiyokay papama’ ka baSe’ a seme:ez ka kapapama’an?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: yako seme:ez ka kapapama’an rima’ kiyokay, nonak seme:ez kayzaeh no papama’ ka baSe’.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: katibae:iwan ’al’alihan ay ki nimon taew’an?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ’oka’, yako seme:ez ka ’otobay rima’ ray katibae:iwan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: kaSateran ka kina:at ’al’alihan ay ki kakiSka:atan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: ’al’alihan, manra:an rima’ ma’ kayzaeh.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: kasi’aelan ’al’alihan ay ki ka’ayna:a’an ka kapapama’an?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: kaSlatar ray ka’ayna:a’an manra:an haseb Sinepe: ’isa:a’ ma’ potngor ila.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
